title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: AMLA's Q3 operational launch puts 27 EU member states under direct crypto supervision while MiCA review consultation (31 August deadline) shapes DeFi and NFT treatment through 2027. France, UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Israel converge on licensing deadlines and framework implementations across Q3 2026, creating a 90-day window where 400+ crypto firms need compliant transaction monitoring, entity risk infrastructure, and custody security before enforcement accelerates in Q4.
